text: Claude Code v2.1.122 reads ANTHROPIC_BEDROCK_SERVICE_TIER. Set flex for 50% off agent calls on Bedrock.
Stdout is for MCP traffic, not logs. The one Program.cs line that keeps a C# MCP server on .NET 11 alive.
SearchValues<T> built once is 250x faster than IndexOfAny. Built per call, it's slower. The static readonly rule, in .NET 11.
